content:
ANC Movers — Client History Brief

1. Business Overview
Name: ANC Movers (legal: ANC Movers Inc)
Owner / Contact: Peter Clarke
Location: Vancouver, WA — also serves Portland OR and Longview WA
Website: https://ancmovers.com/
Phone: 360-992-8702
Email: Peter@ancmovers.com
CRM: In place (type not specified at onboarding)
GMB Profile: ANC Movers – Vancouver & Portland

2. Services Offered
1. Household Goods Moving (primary)
2. Packing of Household Items
3. Commercial Relocation Services

Service rules noted at onboarding:
- No dump runs, donations, or very small jobs
- No packing material-only jobs (refer to U-Haul instead)
- Storage available but limited — do not push it; minimum 2-month regulation
- Not allowed to give discounts
- Senior moves flagged as a growth opportunity

3. Current SEO Situation (at onboarding, Oct 2025)
- GSC and GA not yet set up — flagged at onboarding as needing action
- GMB access confirmed via webaccess@onlineoptimisers.net
- Website is WordPress, access confirmed (login: peterc)
- No web dev work requested by client (answered "NO" to web dev question)
- No Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, or Yelp profiles noted

4. Services We Are Providing
- Full Local SEO package
- GMB management via Local Dominator
- Local content and visibility improvements

5. Business Insights from Onboarding
- Most enquiries are local moves (lower value)
- Packing + moving + long-distance = highest revenue per job
- Commercial relocation is a service line but not primary
- Senior moves flagged as growth opportunity

6. Ideal Client
Best moving experience. Packing and moving services and long-distance moves provide the most revenue. Highest enquiries are local moves. Commercial relocation also served.

7. Competitors
- Big Al's Specialty Moving

8. Relationship Context
Peter Clarke is the owner and main contact. Communication style not noted at onboarding. No special sensitivities recorded.

Note: This history brief was compiled from the onboard sheet. No extended ChatGPT history extraction is available for this client — they joined Oct 2025 and are among the more recently onboarded clients.

- **Phase 1 audit highlight:** AI LEADER (16/20 ChatGPT cited) - best AI performance of all 9 clients. Schema only 6/25 - lock in the win before competitors catch up.

- **Senior moves:** flagged as growth opportunity at onboarding - has this been actioned?
